filterNote: Date objects + YYYY-MM-DD strings always; numeric Excel serials only when column header looks date-related (avoids money/cc/연식 false positives). cellDates:true used; rawExcelSerial from cellDates:false pass.

epochHypothesis.conclusion: No serial 0/1 → 1899-12-30 pattern in date columns; 1930 appears as real Date objects (not Excel epoch empty)
